---
title: "Key Principle 1: Understand AI"
date: 2026-03-21
categories: [key principle, ethics]
description: "A key guiding principle: understand what different AI models do."
---

While the jargon associated with AI can be challenging, it's of key importance to understand
what exactly different models and approaches are doing under the covers so that you can be fully
aware of the applicability of different models and the in-built assumptions involved.

Using a commercial generative AI chatbot to generate a workflow is extremely far removed from using a custom-built machine learning model to identify features in images, yet both are now classed as applications of AI.
